rounds.title: Foundation Chain
rounds.rawInstruction: CH 12. Starting in the 2nd chain from the hook and working in one side of the chain, work as follows.
rounds.summary: Chain 12 to create the foundation, then prepare to work into one side of the chain starting from the second chain from the hook.

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 2 HTC in first stitch, 1 HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2HTC in the next stitch, working in the other side of the chain, 2 HTC in the next stitch, 1HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2 HTC in the last stitch, join to the 1st HTC. Mark the beginning of your round with a stitch marker.
rounds.summary: Work increases and single half treble crochets around both sides of the foundation chain to create an oval base, joining at the end.

rounds.title: Rounds 2-6
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way around
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch for five rounds.

rounds.title: Round 7
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 DC in each stitch all the way around
rounds.summary: Work one double crochet in each stitch around.

rounds.title: Begin flap section
rounds.rawInstruction: Now we will begin to work the flap, from here on we will be working in rows back and forth.
rounds.summary: Transition to working the flap in rows instead of rounds.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 1DC, 1DC, CH 2, turn, 1 HTC in the next 10 stitches, CH 2, turn.
rounds.summary: Work two double crochets, chain 2, turn, then work 10 half treble crochets, chain 2, and turn.

rounds.title: Rows 2-9
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way across, CH 2, turn
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch across for eight rows, chaining 2 and turning at the end of each.

rounds.title: Button hole
rounds.rawInstruction: Now we will work our button hole.
rounds.summary: Prepare to create the button hole in the next row.

rounds.title: Row 10
rounds.rawInstruction: 2HTCtog, 1HTC, 1HTC, CH2, skip the next 2 stitches, 1HTC, 1HTC, 2HTCtog, CH2, turn
rounds.summary: Work decreases and a chain-2 space to create the button hole.

rounds.title: Row 11
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch across and fasten off.

rounds.title: Start button
rounds.summary: Begin the button by creating a magic ring.

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.summary: Work 12 treble crochets into the magic ring and join.

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.summary: Slip stitch into each stitch around.

rounds.title: Attach button
rounds.rawInstruction: Line the button up with where the button hole on the flap lies when in position at the front of the pouch, (you can mark this with a stitch marker) and sew into place.
rounds.summary: Align the button with the button hole and sew it into place.

rounds.title: Weave in ends
rounds.summary: Weave in all loose yarn ends to finish.

materials: DK yarn in the colour(s) of your choice
A button if you aren't going to crochet one
